final_prompt.prompt:

Lighting/mood: needs a natural-light atmosphere with rugged-yet-refined mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include exposed concrete surfaces, metal pipe textures, vintage leather upholstery
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
